news_items.title: Claude Managed Agents: Cloud-Hosted Agent Service for Production
news_items.summary: Anthropic launched Claude Managed Agents on public beta, enabling developers to build and deploy cloud-hosted AI agents via Console, Claude Code, or new CLI. Pricing: standard Claude token rates + $0.08/session-hour (active runtime). Early adopters: Notion, Rakuten, Sentry.

news_items.title: Salesforce Headless 360: Turning CRM into AI Agent Infrastructure
news_items.summary: Salesforce announced Headless 360, exposing 100+ CRM capabilities as MCP tools, REST APIs, and CLI commands for AI agents. Enables deal qualification, opportunity management, and email automation to be AI-driven without browser UI.

news_items.title: Copilot Studio: Multi-Agent Orchestration GA with Agent-to-Agent Protocol
news_items.summary: Microsoft Copilot Studio released multi-agent orchestration features including A2A (Agent-to-Agent) protocol for direct agent communication, Microsoft Fabric integration, and support for Anthropic Claude Opus 4.6 / Sonnet 4.5 (paid experimental preview).

news_items.title: Supabase ES256 & Publishable Key Migration Guide (Confirmed)
news_items.summary: Supabase published complete migration guide for asymmetric ES256 keys with sb_publishable_* and sb_secret_* replacements for legacy anon/service_role keys. Migration optional until 2025-11-01, full backward compatibility confirmed.

academic_papers.title: AgentGL: Towards Agentic Graph Learning with LLMs via Reinforcement Learning
academic_papers.authors: Yuanfu Sun, Kang Li, Dongzhe Fan, Jiajin Liu, Qiaoyu Tan
academic_papers.summary: Proposes Agentic Graph Learning (AGL) framework enabling LLM agents to navigate and reason over graph-structured data through RL. Agents equipped with graph-native tools for multi-scale topology-aware exploration. Results: +17.5% node classification accuracy, +28.4% link prediction improvement. Code publicly available.
